candidate_definitions.text: 🦀🌡️ Real-time system monitor for Apple Silicon Macs (M1–M5). No sudo. TUI, JSON/Prometheus metrics server, and Rust library.

[package] name = "macmon" version = "0.7.1" edition = "2024" description = "Apple Silicon system monitor & Rust library — CPU/GPU power, temperature, RAM. No sudo. TUI, JSON pipe, Prometheus exporter." authors = ["vladkens"] license = "MIT" repository = "https://github.com/vladk…
Outputs current CPU core and package temperatures on macOS.
